Finally got to test this team multiple times against a competent opponent. Most Precious Collection is complete shit. Does nothing the turn you play it and whoever you equip it to dies the turn after. Witch's Wide Brimmed Hat is complete shit. Doesn't even do anything against a Jenkins team.

or it just gets dispelled usually

I usually use tulu with it
Tulu can snipe, and deny aliemus gain
highest health teammate with lowest chance of dying
You should put it on the least important teammate
So the enemy cannot afford to attack them
For example I have tulu doll tawil aigis
Tulu has noble staff, doll and tawil have the wheel and Aigis has the fox bleed wheel
Or you can put it on your dps who can effectively kill as an alternate method
They would prefer other wheels

It does nothing to help the dps land a kill

It's best on a stall team

trying to stall out any Jenkins or cleave team ends really poorly

the wiki is outdated
i think indomit belt still works really good, its even better tbh
it's still effective

1. indomit belt has potential to boost your damage by 90%, the previous version was only 75%
2. the stun mechanic is reworked so the second stun won't do anything to you (this was made to nerf squire unlimited stun)
it's not popular because most of the time you won't get the chance to get that +90% damage boost
people either use otk team or actually so bad that you can win before your indomit belt has any use
i myself like to use destroyer sphere than indomit belt because i get +25% damage boost right away and doesn't have to wait

well you can bring sacrifice poose (it's wanda posse) if you want to use indomit belt, but i think i can use the slot for a better posse such as entangle posse or that one that “discard cards and draw the same amount”
